title: Tree
summary: Aggregate entry point for rank-general left-comb Laplacian words and recurrence interfaces.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Aggregate entry point for rank-general left-comb Laplacian words and recurrence interfaces.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows PolyGJMSoperators/Tree.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

references.locator: Main ambient construction and tangentiality results
references.note: Motivation for rank-general nested Laplacian words; the Lean tree complex goes beyond what is currently instantiated.

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
